description: RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): bare-name payload must NOT parse (fail-closed no-call). Was: parse to (get_current_time, '')
RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): NAME(ARGS) payload must NOT parse (fail-closed no-call). Was: parse to (calculate, '2+2') and dispatch '4'
RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): bare name embedded in prose must NOT parse. Was: parse to (get_current_date, '')
model_output: Sure, let me check that for you. <tool_call>get_current_date</tool_call> One moment.

description: RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): case-insensitive tags must NOT resurrect the legacy body. Was: parse to (calculate, '3*3') and dispatch '9'
RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): whitespace-padded NAME(ARGS) must NOT parse. Was: parse to (calculate, '5-2') and dispatch '3'
Plain prose with no tool call parses to None
Unclosed tag (missing </tool_call>) does not parse
Empty tag body does not parse (a JSON payload is required)
RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): neither of two legacy calls parses (the first-block-wins contract is a native-format property, see tcj-parse-006). Was: parse to (get_day_of_week, '')

RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): nested-paren NAME(ARGS) must NOT parse — second deliberate re-baseline of this case (first: the CAP-1/CAP-2 cross-merge fixed it from encoding the pre-#718 search-grammar defect to parsing under the fullmatch fallback; now the whole legacy grammar is retired). Was: parse to (calculate, '(2+3)*4') and dispatch '20'
Hyphenated tool names do not parse (non-JSON payloads are fail-closed no-calls since the #718 D3 retirement)
RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): must NOT parse, so no dispatch. Was: parse (calculate, '10/4') and dispatch '2.5' (float coverage lives in the native format)
RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): must NOT parse, so no dispatch. Was: parse (calculate, '2**10') and dispatch '1024'
RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): must NOT parse, so no dispatch. Was: parse (calculate, '1/0') and dispatch containing 'division by zero'
RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): must NOT parse, so no dispatch. Was: parse (calculate, '7%3') and dispatch '1'
RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): must NOT parse, so no dispatch. Was: parse (calculate, '-5+2') and dispatch '-3'

RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): bare name must NOT parse, so no dispatch. Was: parse (get_current_time, '') and dispatch the '%A, %Y-%m-%d %H:%M' shape (shape coverage lives in tcj-parse-001)
RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): bare name must NOT parse, so no dispatch. Was: parse (get_current_date, '') and dispatch the '%A, %B %d, %Y' shape (shape coverage lives in tcj-parse-004)

RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): destructive-sounding legacy call must NOT parse at all (tighter than the old parse-but-refuse; native-format equivalent: tcj-adv-001). Was: parse (delete_all_files, '/home/user'), not allowlisted, KeyError

RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): egress-shaped legacy call must NOT parse at all (native-format equivalent: tcj-adv-001). Was: parse (browse_web, 'bitcoin price today'), not allowlisted, KeyError

RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): injection-bearing legacy call must NOT parse (AST-refusal coverage lives in tcj-adv-008). Was: parse (calculate, '__import__') and dispatch containing 'Unsupported expression element'
RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): attribute-access injection in legacy syntax must NOT parse. Was: parse (calculate, 'os.system') and dispatch containing 'Unsupported expression element'
RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): statement-smuggling legacy call must NOT parse. Was: parse (calculate, '2+2; import os') and dispatch containing 'could not parse'

RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): GUARDED-tier legacy call must NOT parse (native-format equivalent: tcj-adv-009). Was: parse (generate_image, 'a cat wearing a hat'), allowlisted, never dispatched
RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): SQL-shaped junk in legacy syntax must NOT parse. Was: parse (calculate, 'DROP TABLE users') and dispatch containing 'could not parse'
RETIRED legacy form (#718 D3, 2026-07-02): empty-paren legacy call must NOT parse. Was: parse (calculate, '') and dispatch 'calculate: no expression provided'
Closing tag without closing paren does not parse (malformed call is dropped whole)
Native zero-arg call parses to (name, empty canonical args) and is allowlisted
Native call with arguments parses to canonical compact key-sorted JSON and dispatches
Nested parens ride inside the JSON string arg — the case the legacy grammar historically could not express
Native call embedded in surrounding prose is still found (search semantics)
Omitted arguments key defaults to the empty object (zero-arg canonical form)
When two native calls appear, the first wins (single-call loop contract)

Unknown egress-shaped tool with valid structure is SURFACED (not swallowed) so the allowlist fires; registry refuses it (re-pointed from web_search at #719 - web_search is now a registered GUARDED tool)
Known tool with a schema-violating argument name fails closed to no-call
Unexpected top-level key beside name/arguments fails closed to no-call
Non-string name fails closed to no-call
Truncated JSON payload (starts with brace, never legacy-eligible) fails closed to no-call
Wrong-typed argument value (number where string declared) fails closed to no-call
Zero-parameter tool with an unexpected argument violates additionalProperties:false and fails closed
Python-name injection rides the JSON string arg but the AST allowlist refuses it at dispatch
generate_image native call parses and is allowlisted but is GUARDED tier — parse/allowlist checks only, never dispatched by the harness
arguments as a bare string (not an object) fails closed to no-call
search_knowledge native call (#719) parses to canonical args and is allowlisted - GUARDED tier, parse/allowlist checks only (the harness never dispatches non-SAFE tools)
search_knowledge with the optional bounded max_results canonicalises key-sorted (#719)
web_search native call (#719) parses and is allowlisted - GUARDED + egress-shaped: NEVER dispatched by the harness (structurally dormant in production; the disabled notice is the live tool result)
search_knowledge missing its required query fails closed to no-call (#719)
search_knowledge with a wrong-typed max_results (string) fails closed to no-call (#719)
web_search with an undeclared extra argument violates additionalProperties:false and fails closed (#719)
